title: Subagent
description: The task tool spawns a fresh subagent context and returns only a final summary to the parent.

steps.content: Explore how the CLI parser works without polluting this main context.
steps.annotation: The user asks for exploratory work that can be isolated.

steps.content: {"prompt":"Explore the CLI parser and summarize the control flow."}
steps.annotation: The parent delegates through the task tool.
The child receives a fresh message history and no recursive task tool.
Inside the child loop, intermediate tool calls stay private.

steps.content: Summary: cli.py parses args, selects a command handler, then dispatches.
steps.annotation: Only the subagent's final summary returns to the parent.

steps.content: The parser is isolated in cli.py and dispatches by command name. I'll use that summary in the main plan.
steps.annotation: The parent avoids carrying every exploratory detail.
